prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report an RUL estimate in days, compare it against the 180-day horizon, and provide a clear maintenance recommendation.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016
  Step 2: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Forecast the RUL for transformer T-016 for the next 180 days (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] none — Determine if transformer T-016 can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [wo] estimate_downtime — Determine the priority of maintenance for transformer T-016 based on its current RUL estimate and the required safe operation period of 180 days
  Step 5: [wo] create_work_order — Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-016 with the determined priority and estimated downtime (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order status to "open" and assign a technician for maintenance on transformer T-016 (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [wo] list_work_orders — List all work orders for transformer T-016 to verify the new maintenance schedule (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [wo] create_work_order — Expedite maintenance for transformer T-016 by creating a new work order with high priority and estimated downtime of 24 hours, as determined from the current RUL estimate and required safe operation period.
  Step 9: [wo] update_work_order — Update the status of the newly created work order for transformer T-016 to "in_progress" and assign a technician for maintenance, ensuring timely execution of the required maintenance. (depends on steps [8])
  Step 10: [wo] list_work_orders — List all work orders for transformer T-016 to verify that the new maintenance schedule has been successfully updated and is ready for execution. (depends on steps [9])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 57,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0522,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Degraded \\u2014 maintenance recommended within 30 days.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "RUL estimate is lower than required safe operation period",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "Prioritize maintenance scheduling",
    "retries_used": 0,
    "verifier_replan_raw_plan": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "task": "Determine the priority of maintenance for transformer T-016 based on its current RUL estimate and the required safe operation period of 180 days",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "estimate_downtime",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [],
        "expected_output": "Estimated downtime for maintenance on transformer T-016"
      },
      {
        "step": 2,
        "task": "Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-016 with the determined priority and estimated downtime",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "create_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          1
        ],
        "expected_output": "New work order ID and details for transformer T-016"
      },
      {
        "step": 3,
        "task": "Update the work order status to \"open\" and assign a technician for maintenance on transformer T-016",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "update_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          2
        ],
        "expected_output": "Updated work order details for transformer T-016"
      },
      {
        "step": 4,
        "task": "List all work orders for transformer T-016 to verify the new maintenance schedule",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "list_work_orders",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          3
        ],
        "expected_output": "List of work orders for transformer T-016, including the new maintenance schedule"
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Determine the priority of maintenance for transformer T-016 based on its current RUL estimate and the required safe operation period of 180 days",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016",
      "severity": "high",
      "fault_type": "degradation"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"degradation\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 16,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 24,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "RUL estimate is lower than required safe operation period",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "expedite maintenance",
    "retries_used": 0,
    "verifier_replan_raw_plan": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "task": "Expedite maintenance for transformer T-016 by creating a new work order with high priority and estimated downtime of 24 hours, as determined from the current RUL estimate and required safe operation period.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "create_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [],
        "expected_output": "A new work order ID for the maintenance of transformer T-016."
      },
      {
        "step": 2,
        "task": "Update the status of the newly created work order for transformer T-016 to \"in_progress\" and assign a technician for maintenance, ensuring timely execution of the required maintenance.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "update_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          1
        ],
        "expected_output": "The updated work order details with the new status and assigned technician."
      },
      {
        "step": 3,
        "task": "List all work orders for transformer T-016 to verify that the new maintenance schedule has been successfully updated and is ready for execution.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "list_work_orders",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          2
        ],
        "expected_output": "A list of work orders for transformer T-016, including the newly created and updated work order."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "step": 8,
    "task": "Expedite maintenance for transformer T-016 by creating a new work order with high priority and estimated downtime of 24 hours, as determined from the current RUL estimate and required safe operation period.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016",
      "issue_description": "Expedite maintenance for transformer T-016 due to degraded condition and limited remaining useful life",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "degradation",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-A302131A\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Expedite maintenance for transformer T-016 due to degraded condition and limited remaining useful life\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"degradation\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:45:54.935037Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 9,
    "task": "Update the status of the newly created work order for transformer T-016 to \"in_progress\" and assign a technician for maintenance, ensuring timely execution of the required maintenance.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-A302131A",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "priority": "high",
      "assigned_technician": "Technician 1",
      "note": "Maintenance for transformer T-016 is in progress to address degraded condition."
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-A302131A' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-A302131A' not found in this session.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order 'WO-A302131A' not found in this session."
  },
  {
    "step": 10,
    "task": "List all work orders for transformer T-016 to verify that the new maintenance schedule has been successfully updated and is ready for execution.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_work_orders",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order update failed",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "Resolve work order 'WO-A302131A' status update issue",
    "retries_used": 0
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the current RUL estimate of 57 days, transformer T-016 cannot safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance. Its health index indicates a degraded condition, and maintenance is recommended within 30 days.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve error handling for work order updates and verify work order status before listing."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve error handling for work order updates and verify work order status before listing.
